title: Sushi Delivery Co.
description:
Play in tiny few‑delivery cozy sessions as you run a small sushi courier service in a connected three‑street Tokyo‑inspired micro‑neighborhood, hopping into your electric kei‑car to take orders and explore places like The Castle, Grandma’s House, and The Restaurant while soft lights, warm storefronts, and rainy city ambience make each run a relaxing moment you can return to anytime.

FeaturesA Tiny World With Big PersonalityExplore a handcrafted three‑street district filled with vending machines, warm lights, and tiny storefronts tucked into the rainy day. There are no markers — you naturally find each delivery spot as you learn the neighborhood. Every corner feels alive.

Deliver Sushi, Earn Tips, Upgrade Your RideComplete delivery runs, earn yen, and improve your delivery flow. Faster routes, smoother handling, and better efficiency mean happier customers.

In‑Car Radio With 3 Chill ChannelsCruise with lo‑fi beats, Japanese ambience, or classical melodies. The radio remembers your last station automatically.

A Relaxing, Atmospheric ExperienceNo combat. No stress. Just vibes. Drive, explore, deliver, and enjoy the soft glow of a quiet Tokyo‑inspired day.

Clean, Cozy Visual StyleA minimalist aesthetic with warm lighting, soft colors, and a calm mood — designed to feel like a midday walk through your favorite neighborhood.

Simple Controls, Smooth DrivingEasy to pick up, satisfying to master. Perfect for short sessions or long chill nights.

Controls• WASD or LT/RT/LS — Drive

• E or X — Interact / Pick Up / Deliver Sushi

• Enter or Y — Enter Shop

• Music Note Button or B — Change Radio Track
description_short: Play in tiny few‑delivery cozy sessions as you drive your little Kei‑car through a small Japanese neighborhood, discovering places like The Castle, Grandma’s House, and the Restaurant while soft lights, calm music, and rainy city ambience make each run a relaxing moment you can return to anytime.
